name: hk-broker-tax-reconcile
description: Offline broker statement reconciliation for China individual income tax filing.

interface.longDescription: Parse local Futu, Hafoo, and Tiger statement files, identify missing opening cost basis, calculate stock-sale gains, dividends, foreign tax credits, and China IIT app filing fields without uploading private data.
defaultPrompt: Use HK Broker Tax Reconcile on my local broker statements.
Find missing opening costs before calculating tax fields.
Generate China IIT app filing values from broker files.
